top_signals.title: Stocks Climb as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Near: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street powered a rebound in stocks as oil fell after President Donald Trump canceled planned strikes against Iran and signaled a deal is near, fueling hopes for an end to the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: High-Yield Issuance Concentrated: JPMorgan's Herr
top_signals.summary: Kay Herr, CIO of US GFICC at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Fears of a stagflation shock from the Middle East conflict are increasingly souring investor sentiment toward the weakest global corporate borrowers, many of which binged on cheap debt during the era of ultra-low interest rates. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging Assets Rebound as Trump Cancels Strike, Signals Deal
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies jumped and stocks erased earlier losses after President Donald Trump canceled planned attacks on Iran, fueling optimism that a deal was imminent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hungary to scrap Orban-era crypto rules that carried jail terms: reports
top_signals.summary: Hungary will decriminalize crypto trading, reversing Orban-era rules that carried jail terms and led platforms like Revolut to suspend services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Keir Starmer weakened by John Healey’s scathing resignation
top_signals.summary: Defence secretary’s exit may turn out to be the first of many in the coming weeks

top_signals.title: Max severity Ivanti Sentry vulnerability now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers are now targeting a recently patched maximum-severity flaw in Ivanti Sentry, enabling them to execute code with root privileges on Internet-exposed secure mobile gateways. [...]
